task_completion.description: Open the T8 housing bracket model in FreeCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is open, displaying a 3D model of a mechanical bracket. The window title or tree view should indicate 'T8_housing_bracket'.

task_completion.description: Add a linear dimension for the base length
task_completion.visual_evidence: A linear dimension line with a measurement value is visible along the longest edge of the bracket's base in the 3D view.

task_completion.description: Add a linear dimension for the base width
task_completion.visual_evidence: A linear dimension line with a measurement value is visible along the shorter edge (width) of the bracket's base in the 3D view.

task_completion.description: Add a dimension for the diameter of the large central shaft hole
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension line indicating the diameter (often with a diameter symbol or crossing the center) is visible on the large central hole of the bracket.
All the added dimension lines and their corresponding text values are clearly colored red.

task_completion.description: Save the annotated model as T8_annotated.FCStd
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'T8_annotated.FCStd' being saved in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/', or the FreeCAD window title updates to 'T8_annotated'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to add dimensions and save the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through FreeCAD menus, workbenches (like Draft or TechDraw), and toolbars to create the dimensions, rather than just running a background script.

integrity.description: The dimensions are actual FreeCAD objects
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimensions appear as selectable objects in the FreeCAD Tree View (left panel) and are integrated into the 3D workspace, not just text overlaid on a screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD interface is clearly visible and in focus, confirming the agent did not use a text editor to modify the raw XML of the .FCStd file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd', which contains real parametric mechanical geometry. The output file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_annotated.FCStd'. The task requires at least 3 dimensions (base length, base width, and large central shaft hole diameter). The expected color for all dimensions is pure red (RGB: 255, 0, 0, which normalizes to 1.0, 0.0, 0.0 in FreeCAD).
